items.situation: career fair preparation workshop with resume review
items.announcement: Sign-ups for this year's Career Fair Prep Workshop open next Monday, and space is limited to forty students. We'll meet in the Career Center's Bradley Room next Thursday from 3 to 5 p.m., where staff will review your resume line by line and run a short mock interview. Please bring two printed copies of your current resume; we can't review drafts on a phone screen. Employers attending the fair told us they screen resumes in under a minute, so tightening yours now really pays off.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Invite students to a resume-review workshop
options.B: Explain how the career fair is judged
options.C: Report how quickly employers screen resumes
options.D: Cancel this year's on-campus career fair

questions.explanation: A正确：整则通知的核心是邀请学生报名参加简历修改与模拟面试工作坊。B错（wrong_purpose）：通知从未提到招聘会如何评判，这不是本次通知的目的。C错（too_narrow）：雇主一分钟看简历只是用来说明参加工作坊的价值，是细节而非主旨。D错（reversed_intent）：通知是在筹备招聘会，而非取消它，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the workshop's resume review?

options.A: Employers spend under a minute reviewing
options.B: It focuses mainly on interview attire
options.C: It helps students make resumes concise
options.D: It guarantees interviews with every employer

questions.explanation: C正确：既然雇主一分钟内就筛完简历，逐行修改的目的显然是帮学生把简历改得更精炼、易读，这是合理推断。A错（literal_restatement）：这是通知里直接陈述的事实，属于原文复述而非推断。B错（unrelated_inference）：通知只提模拟面试，从未涉及面试着装，属无关推断。D错（over_inference）：通知没有任何内容保证能获得面试机会，推断过度。

items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. The senior capstone presentations for the Engineering Department are now scheduled for next Wednesday and Thursday in Foster Hall, Room 210. Each senior will give a fifteen-minute talk followed by questions, and the full timetable is posted outside the department office. Anyone is welcome to attend, but seating fills quickly, so please arrive a few minutes early. Presenters must upload their slides to the shared drive by 5 p.m. this Friday.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: Recruiting outside faculty judges for the presentations
options.B: The schedule for senior capstone presentations

questions.explanation: B正确：通知主要告知工程系毕业设计答辩的日程与地点安排。A错（wrong_purpose）：通知没有招募任何评委，这不是其目的。C错（too_narrow）：通知谈的是答辩安排，而非新的毕业要求，混淆了主题。D错（reversed_intent）：答辩正常举行并公布了时间表，取消之说与原意相反。

questions.stem: What must presenters do before Friday at 5 p.m.?

options.A: Reserve seats for their family members
options.B: Email their slides directly to the department office
options.C: Print copies of the full timetable
options.D: Upload their slides to the shared drive

questions.explanation: D正确：通知明确要求发言者在本周五下午五点前把幻灯片上传到共享盘。A错（related_but_not_stated）：通知只说座位有限要早到，从未提到为家人预留座位。B错（misattributed_detail）：幻灯片是上传到共享盘，而非邮件发给系办公室，弄错了提交方式。C错（wrong_detail）：时间表是系里张贴在办公室外的，不是发言者需要打印的东西。

items.situation: undergraduate research symposium abstract submission deadline
items.announcement: Abstracts for the Fall Undergraduate Research Symposium are due by 11:59 p.m. next Friday, and late entries won't be considered. This year we're piloting a new format: instead of a poster, you'll record a five-minute video summary that judges review in advance. You don't need finished results to apply, but your abstract must clearly state the question you're investigating and your method. Submit through the research office portal, and please ensure you list a faculty sponsor who has agreed to advise you. Selected presenters will be notified the following Wednesday and must attend a short orientation in Kline Hall.

questions.stem: What is new about this year's symposium?

options.A: Faculty sponsors now present the research themselves
options.B: Cash prizes are awarded to winners
options.C: Presenters submit a recorded video summary
options.D: Finished results are required to apply

questions.explanation: C正确：通知说今年改用新形式，用五分钟录制视频取代海报，供评委提前观看。A错（misattributed_detail）：导师是同意指导并被列出，而非替学生做展示，张冠李戴。B错（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到任何现金奖励，属合理但未提及的内容。D错（wrong_detail）：通知明确说不需要完成的结果即可申请，与选项相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about who may apply?

options.A: Early-stage research is welcome to apply
options.B: All submitted abstracts will be accepted
options.C: The symposium is only for science majors
options.D: Judges review the videos before the event

questions.explanation: A正确：既然无需完成的结果、只要说明研究问题和方法即可申请，说明处于早期阶段的研究也可以参加，这是合理推断。B错（over_inference）：通知只说逾期不受理，并未保证所有摘要都被录取，推断过度。C错（unrelated_inference）：通知未限定学科，也没有任何仅限理科的暗示，属无关推断。D错（literal_restatement）：评委提前看视频是原文直接陈述的事实，是复述而非推断。

items.situation: student art market in the quad
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. This Saturday the Student Art Market returns to the Main Quad from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m., rain or shine. More than thirty student artists will sell paintings, ceramics, and handmade jewelry, with all proceeds going to the campus food pantry. Vendors should check in at the information tent by 9 a.m. to claim their assigned table. Please bring cash if you can, since not every booth accepts cards, and stop by the coffee stand near the fountain.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit volunteers for the food pantry
options.B: To advertise a new coffee stand
options.C: To announce reduced Main Quad hours
options.D: To promote a student art market

questions.explanation: D正确：整则通知的核心是宣传本周六在中央广场举办的学生艺术集市。A错（wrong_purpose）：食品救济站只是义卖所得的去向，通知并非招募志愿者。B错（too_narrow）：咖啡摊只是顺带一提的细节，不是主旨。C错（reversed_intent）：通知是在广场举办活动，而非缩减广场开放时间，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What are shoppers advised to bring?

options.A: Reusable bags for carrying home their purchases
options.B: Cash for vendors without card readers
options.D: Cards accepted at every art booth

questions.explanation: B正确：通知建议尽量带现金，因为并非每个摊位都能刷卡。A错（related_but_not_stated）：环保购物袋听起来合理，但通知里根本没提。C错（misattributed_detail）：带作品来展示是学生艺术家（摊主）的行为，不是购物者要做的事，张冠李戴。D错（wrong_detail）：通知恰恰说不是每个摊位都收卡，与该选项相反。

items.situation: grand reopening of renovated gallery or performance hall
items.announcement: Before we wrap up, I want to remind you that the renovated Hartley Recital Hall reopens this Friday, and I'd really like our class to attend together. There's a free chamber concert at 7 p.m. to celebrate, and the new acoustic panels are supposed to sound remarkable. Doors open at six-thirty, but seats aren't reserved, so you'll need to meet me in the Hartley Hall lobby by six-fifteen. It ties right into next week's unit on concert-hall design, so I'll count attendance as extra credit.

questions.stem: Why is the speaker making this announcement?

options.A: To invite the class to a reopening
options.B: To describe the hall's renovated acoustic panels
options.C: To explain the format of next week's exam
options.D: To cancel the planned class trip

questions.explanation: A正确：教授的主要意图是邀请全班一起去参加改建后音乐厅的重新开放音乐会。B错（too_narrow）：新声学板只是介绍活动亮点的细节，不是说话目的。C错（wrong_purpose）：通知从未讲解任何考试形式，与内容无关。D错（reversed_intent）：教授是在组织大家一起去，而非取消活动，与原意相反。

questions.stem: Where does the speaker ask the class to meet?

options.B: At the box office at seven

questions.explanation: C正确：教授明确说六点十五在Hartley Hall大厅集合。A错（related_but_not_stated）：在音乐厅门外听起来合理，但教授指定的是大厅内，未提门外。B错（wrong_detail）：七点是音乐会开始时间，且座位不预留，并非在售票处集合，弄错了时间和地点。D错（misattributed_detail）：下周的设计课是与此活动相关的后续内容，不是集合地点，张冠李戴。
